description: You are an Operations Engineer at AcmeCorp. Five microservices (acme-web, acme-api, acme-worker, acme-scheduler, and acme-notifier) were deployed with inconsistent logging configurations, causing data loss. Audit the logging configuration of these containers to identify a critical error code starting with 'ERR-' preserved in the logs. Standardize the logging for all five services by recreating them with the suffix '-fixed' (e.g., 'acme-web-fixed') using the 'json-file' driver with 'max-size=10m' and 'max-file=3', while preserving the original images and behaviors. Stop the original containers and document the original configuration errors, the discovered error code, and the new standards applied in a report at ~/Desktop/log_audit_report.txt. Login: user ga, password password123.
